title: Golden Transcripts, net.Pipe, Differential Tests, Fuzzing, Race, and Benchmarks · Execution Trace: Fuzz Properties Corpus
summary: Tests send one complete request through loopback, compare only status, reuse the implementation as its own oracle, fuzz without invariants, and publish benchmark throughput without fragmentation or adversarial peers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fuzz properties corpus increment in layered deterministic protocol verification system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Fuzz parser and serializer with seed corpora, fragmentation, invariants, round trips, bounds, no panic, no hang, and retained minimized failures.
Compare supported inputs with Go net/http and independent recipients while treating deliberate strictness and implementation quirks as reviewed differences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Fuzz Properties Corpus · Theory Fuzz Properties Corpus
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory protocol team handles case 1284 in a archival client parsing incomplete close-delimited responses. Build deterministic Go evidence to gate parser work on transcripts, fragmentation, differential, fuzz, and leak evidence; preserve this operating constraint: the maintained Go protocol stack remains the production transfer target; then minimize a fuzz failure and add it to the deterministic regression corpus. Browser code models bounded byte and state decisions only. Sockets, listeners, live TLS, proxies, packet capture, fuzz campaigns, races, load, HTTP/2, HTTP/3, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Fuzz parser and serializer with seed corpora, fragmentation, invariants, round trips, bounds, no panic, no hang, and retained minimized failures.
